finalized_plan.description: Visit the Mercedes Sosa Wikipedia page using the URL "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mercedes_Sosa" to confirm that we are on the correct 2022 version
Use the "find_on_page_ctrl_f" tool to locate the "Studio albums" section within the Discography
Extract the complete text block associated with the "Studio albums" section, ensuring that album titles and release years are visible
Parse the extracted text to clearly identify each studio album’s title and its corresponding release year
Filter the parsed list to identify those studio albums released between 2000 and 2009, inclusive
Count the number of studio albums that meet the criteria and create a detailed list showing each album title and release year for that period

Format the final answer to include: 
 • A short summary of the task outcome,
 • An extremely detailed explanation of the process and final findings,
 • Additional context as necessary

root_cause_reasoning: The agent accessed the correct webpage, but the content it retrieved did not actually contain the album release information
